name: read_url
description: Read content from web pages, PDFs, Word documents using UniFuncs AI-powered reader. Use this when you need to extract, summarize, or analyze content from any URL. Supports AI extraction for specific topics, CSS filtering, and multiple output formats.

url.description: URL to read (web page, PDF, Word document, etc.)

format.description: Output format: markdown, md, text, or txt

lite_mode.description: Enable lite mode - only keep readable content, strip ads and navigation

only_css_selectors.description: Only include elements matching these CSS selectors (e.g., '.article_content')

wait_for_css_selectors.description: Wait for these CSS selectors to appear before parsing (e.g., '#main', '.content')

exclude_css_selectors.description: Exclude elements matching these CSS selectors (e.g., '#footer', '.copyright')

link_summary.description: Append all page links to the end of content

ignore_cache.description: Ignore cached content, force fresh fetch

set_cookie.description: Set cookies for pages requiring authentication

topic.description: Use AI to extract content related to a specific topic/question

preserve_source.description: Add source citation to each paragraph when using topic extraction

temperature.description: AI generation randomness for topic extraction (0.0-1.5)
